title: Just Scythe
body:
Have you ever wanted some scythe in minecraft? I did... so now enjoy this scythe mod!

This mod adds golden, iron, diamond, and netherite scythe, all of them are craftable. If you have cheat enable you can also use command to get them.

## Give command
```
/function scythe:give/<material>_scythe
```

## Scythe stats:
- 1.6 attack speed
- +0.5 mob interaction range
- +0.25 sweeping attack bonus
- Attack:
  - Gold: 6 damages
  - Iron: 7 damages
  - Diamond: 8 damages
  - Netherite: 9 damages
- Durability:
  - Gold: 32
  - Iron: 250
  - Diamond: 1561
  - Netherite: 2031
- Allow to parry melee and 50% of range attacks
